descriptionText: Horizon FD 80 For Sale 202 | Guest Cabins: 4 | Crew Cabins:4 PRICE : 4,900,000 US$Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 presents an appealing opportunity for anyone seeking a modern 24.5‑metre motor yacht with generous volume and a thoughtful layout. Part of Horizon’s well‑regarded Fast Displacement series, this FD80 model is designed to offer a balance of comfort, practicality and contemporary style. Delivered in 2021 and maintained in good condition, she provides a capable platform for both private cruising and enjoyable time onboard with family or friends.Specifications: • Brand: Horizon • Year: 2021 • Length: 24.5 m • Max. Beam: 6.8 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 1.7 m • Gross Tonnage: 140 GT • Location: Hong Kong • Max Speed: 20 knots • Fuel Tank: 10,220 l • Water Tank: 1,500 l • Engines: 2 x MAN 1182 HP • Guest Cabins: 4 • Crew Cabins: 4The Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 is built with a focus on creating bright, open spaces that make full use of her beam. Her exterior profile highlights clean lines and a contemporary feel, while still keeping functionality at the forefront. One of the standout design elements is the extensive use of floor‑to‑ceiling glass in the main salon and dining area. This feature brings natural light into the interior and helps create an open, comfortable environment with uninterrupted views.On deck, the FD80 benefits from a practical layout that supports both relaxation and social time. Her outdoor spaces are notably generous for a yacht in this size range, rivaling those typically seen on larger 90‑foot‑plus vessels. The bridge deck aft provides ample room for seating and can accommodate a 16‑foot tender, offering flexibility for water activities or shore trips. Side wing stations assist in improving visibility during docking, a helpful feature for owner‑operators.Inside, the on‑deck master stateroom takes advantage of the yacht’s beam, creating a comfortable and private retreat with natural light from the surrounding glass sections. Below deck, three further guest cabins continue the theme of openness and functionality. Two VIP cabins and an additional guest stateroom provide comfortable accommodation for guests, and the presence of a window in the garage allows light to reach the beach club, enhancing the sense of space on the lower level.The salon is arranged to encourage conversation and relaxation, with easy access to the dining area and galley. The overall interior style is modern without being overly bold, offering a welcoming atmosphere suitable for long stays onboard. Materials and finishes have been selected with durability in mind, supporting the yacht’s suitability for regular cruising.Powered by twin MAN 1182 HP engines, the Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 reaches a top speed of 20 knots and provides efficient performance across a range of conditions. Her hull design supports stability and smooth cruising, whether operating at displacement speeds or higher.For those looking at the market for a well‑maintained motor yacht with good volume, balanced performance and a smart layout, Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 stands out as a practical and appealing choice.
descriptionHtml:
Horizon FD 80 For Sale 202 | Guest Cabins: 4 | Crew Cabins:4
PRICE : 4,900,000 US$

Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 presents an appealing opportunity for anyone seeking a modern 24.5‑metre motor yacht with generous volume and a thoughtful layout. Part of Horizon’s well‑regarded Fast Displacement series, this FD80 model is designed to offer a balance of comfort, practicality and contemporary style. Delivered in 2021 and maintained in good condition, she provides a capable platform for both private cruising and enjoyable time onboard with family or friends.

Specifications:
• Brand: Horizon
• Year: 2021
• Length: 24.5 m
• Max. Beam: 6.8 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 1.7 m
• Gross Tonnage: 140 GT
• Location: Hong Kong
• Max Speed: 20 knots
• Fuel Tank: 10,220 l
• Water Tank: 1,500 l
• Engines: 2 x MAN 1182 HP
• Guest Cabins: 4
• Crew Cabins: 4

The Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 is built with a focus on creating bright, open spaces that make full use of her beam. Her exterior profile highlights clean lines and a contemporary feel, while still keeping functionality at the forefront. One of the standout design elements is the extensive use of floor‑to‑ceiling glass in the main salon and dining area. This feature brings natural light into the interior and helps create an open, comfortable environment with uninterrupted views.

On deck, the FD80 benefits from a practical layout that supports both relaxation and social time. Her outdoor spaces are notably generous for a yacht in this size range, rivaling those typically seen on larger 90‑foot‑plus vessels. The bridge deck aft provides ample room for seating and can accommodate a 16‑foot tender, offering flexibility for water activities or shore trips. Side wing stations assist in improving visibility during docking, a helpful feature for owner‑operators.

Inside, the on‑deck master stateroom takes advantage of the yacht’s beam, creating a comfortable and private retreat with natural light from the surrounding glass sections. Below deck, three further guest cabins continue the theme of openness and functionality. Two VIP cabins and an additional guest stateroom provide comfortable accommodation for guests, and the presence of a window in the garage allows light to reach the beach club, enhancing the sense of space on the lower level.

The salon is arranged to encourage conversation and relaxation, with easy access to the dining area and galley. The overall interior style is modern without being overly bold, offering a welcoming atmosphere suitable for long stays onboard. Materials and finishes have been selected with durability in mind, supporting the yacht’s suitability for regular cruising.

Powered by twin MAN 1182 HP engines, the Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 reaches a top speed of 20 knots and provides efficient performance across a range of conditions. Her hull design supports stability and smooth cruising, whether operating at displacement speeds or higher.

For those looking at the market for a well‑maintained motor yacht with good volume, balanced performance and a smart layout, Horizon FD 80 For Sale 2021 stands out as a practical and appealing choice.
